title: crotalaria stolzii
intro: Crotalaria stolzii, also known as Stolz's rattlebox, is a plant species in the family Fabaceae. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, particularly its anthelmintic and antibacterial properties. The health benefits of Crotalaria stolzii include its ability to treat intestinal parasites, wounds, and skin conditions, due to its antimicrobial and anti-inflammatory properties. Crotalaria stolzii is often prepared as a decoction or infusion, and has been used in herbal medicine to promote wound healing, reduce inflammation, and treat infections.
